items.title: Oil prices jump by the most in two months after Trump suggests U.S.-Iran cease-fire is over
items.description: Brent crude and West Texas Intermediate contracts climbed on President Donald Trump saying dealing with Tehran is “a waste of time”

items.title: I’m 73 and still work full time. Can I avoid paying taxes on my Social Security benefits?
items.description: “I’m actually earning more each week than I ever have before.”

items.title: Dakota Johnson quickly sells $6 million midcentury modern home in L.A.
items.description: “Fifty Shades” star Dakota Johnson has officially sold her stunning Los Angeles home for just a few dollars under her $6 million asking price—just days after putting it on the market.

items.title: After selling her $5 million Westchester home, Drew Barrymore shows off her RV
items.description: Drew Barrymore is going back to basics for her summer getaway this year—revealing that she is ready to take an adventure in an RV.

items.title: Alibaba just had its best day in 10 months. Is it time for China techs to catch up?
items.description: Alibaba on Wednesday saw its best single share-price gain in 10 months, as the broader Chinese tech sector revved higher after missing the rally propelling U.S., Korean and Taiwanese companies.

items.title: It was the world’s hottest stock market. Now South Korea’s stock market has entered bear-market territory

items.title: Plot twist: Gen Z is buying houses after all. Here’s how they’re doing it.
items.description: Despite soaring housing costs, younger buyers are finding a way in.

items.title: Rivian’s stock sale triggers worst rout for the shares in nearly two years
items.description: Rivian’s stock falls 18% as Wall Street frets about the EV maker’s cash troubles.

items.title: ‘Our family is broken beyond repair’: My brother took over my parents’ finances. What can I do?
items.description: “Without telling me, my brother petitioned for sole guardianship of our mother.”

items.title: Micron’s stock falls as investors wonder if the memory market is near the top
items.description: “Most investor feedback continues to point to a skittish AI tape,” one analyst said.
